title: Process Engineer Vacancy at RINL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at RINL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, RINL in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About RINL:
RINL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
